boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.

flags.name: high_turnover_tax_drag
flags.review_prompt: Ask a human reviewer to confirm turnover, realized gain, tax rate, and taxable allocation assumptions before sharing.

flags.name: long_horizon
flags.review_prompt: Ask a human reviewer to confirm that the horizon is intentional for this static scenario review.

flags.name: frequent_rebalancing
flags.review_prompt: Ask a human reviewer to confirm rebalance frequency and cost-per-event assumptions.

review_note: Flags are prompts for human review only and are not recommendations, suitability analysis, or tax/legal/investment advice.
